revenue.title: Revenue Analytics
revenue.description: Only records with confirmed sold dates are counted as recognized revenue (KST).
revenue.dataWarningDescSuffix: These are excluded from recognized revenue calculations.
revenue.noRevenueDataDesc: No revenue data available for this period.
revenue.loadErrorMessage: Failed to load data. Please try again shortly.

analytics.loadErrorMessage: Failed to load analytics data. Please try again shortly.
analytics.title: Site Analytics
analytics.titleHelp: Pageview and visitor statistics collected through Vercel Analytics Drain. Only data after Drain setup is shown.
analytics.description: Review visitor trends and top-performing pages.
analytics.noCountryDataDesc: No country-based visit data for this period.
analytics.noReferrerDataDesc: No referrer data for this period.
analytics.crossLinksDescription: Measures clicks between magazine stories and artwork pages — body inline references, artist-tag fallback, and recent fallback. Tracking infrastructure live from 2026-05-08; events before that date have empty properties.
analytics.noCrossLinkDataDesc: Clicks between magazine and artwork cards will appear here.
analytics.insightsDescription: Session depth, exit patterns, and UTM campaigns — key indicators for operational decisions. Returning-visitor rate is unmeasurable because Vercel Drain's deviceId is daily-salted.
analytics.exitPagesDesc: High exit rate suggests UI/CTA review. Pages with fewer than 5 views are excluded as noise.
analytics.utmDesc: Tagged traffic (ads, newsletters). Used for campaign ROI measurement.
analytics.noUtmDataDesc: Traffic with URL parameters like ?utm_source=naver&utm_medium=cpc will appear here.
analytics.commerceDescription: Conversion flow from artwork page views to payment. Spot revenue leakage at each stage.
analytics.topArtworkFunnelDesc: Sorted by paid revenue. Artworks with fewer than 10 page views excluded as noise. Low view→checkout or checkout→paid rates indicate pricing/image/CTA issues.
analytics.revenueTrendDesc: Based on paid_at timestamp. Verify campaign/ad effectiveness by day.
analytics.noRevenueDataDesc: Daily trend appears once paid orders occur within this period.
analytics.noFunnelDataDesc: Appears once artworks with 10+ page views accumulate.
analytics.attributionDescription: Which artists drive revenue, which magazine stories convert to payment. Used for ads, content, and artist promotion priorities.
analytics.artistDashboardDesc: Sorted by paid revenue. Artists with views but zero revenue need pricing/exposure review.
analytics.storyAttributionDesc: Paid revenue from artworks clicked in the story (last-touch attribution). Revenue is double-counted if an artwork is clicked in multiple stories — for comparing story effectiveness only. Precise attribution is a future task.
analytics.noArtistDataDesc: Appears once artist artwork pageviews or paid orders occur.
analytics.noAttributionDataDesc: Appears once a story-clicked artwork is paid for.
analytics.sectionTrafficDesc: Visitor volume, time of day, devices, countries, and acquisition channels.
analytics.sectionCommerceDesc: Funnel from artwork view to paid order, plus revenue contribution per artwork and artist.
analytics.sectionStoryImpactDesc: Whether stories drive clicks to artworks, and whether those clicks convert to revenue.
analytics.sectionBehaviorDesc: Session depth, exit pages, and UTM campaigns — signals for CRO and campaign ROI.
analytics.sectionSeoDesc: Organic impressions, clicks, CTR, and average position from Google Search Console.
analytics.gscDescription: How pages appear and get clicked in Google Search results. Low-CTR queries are signals to improve titles/meta descriptions. Data syncs daily at 5am KST; GSC itself has ~2-day lag, so the latest data is D-2.
analytics.gscSyncStatusDesc: Last fetch time and number of cached rows. Data older than 30 days is auto-cleaned.
analytics.gscNoDataDesc: Cron has not run yet, or GSC has no data. You can manually call /api/internal/gsc-sync to seed initial data.
analytics.gscDailyTrendDesc: Day-by-day impressions, clicks, CTR, and average position over the last 30 days.
analytics.gscTopQueriesDesc: Top 30 by impressions. Reveals which queries surface your site — useful for content direction.
analytics.gscTopPagesDesc: Top 30 pages by clicks from search. Shows which pages drive SEO traffic.
analytics.gscLowCtrDesc: Top 20 queries with 50+ impressions but low CTR. Visible in search but not clicked = title/meta description isn't compelling. Priority improvement targets.
analytics.sectionRumDesc: Web Vitals measured in actual user browsers — LCP·INP·CLS·FCP·TTFB. PSI is a simulation; this is the real user distribution.
analytics.wvDescription: Google thresholds: LCP 2.5s / INP 200ms / CLS 0.1. p75 means 75% of users experience the value at or below (Core Web Vitals criteria).
analytics.wvNoDataDesc: If self-tracking just started, wait for more user traffic to accumulate.
analytics.wvSummaryDesc: p75 + good / needs-improvement / poor distribution per metric (LCP·CLS·INP·FCP·TTFB).
analytics.wvDailyDesc: Days where p75 crosses the threshold flag deployments or content changes that caused regression.
analytics.wvLcpWorstDesc: Pages with worst p75 LCP, TOP 10 (samples <3 excluded as noise).
analytics.sectionCtaDesc: Membership CTAs and share-channel distribution. External-domain exits are invisible to page_view/UTM, so we track them explicitly.
analytics.ctaMemberJoinDesc: External conversion — clicks routing to the JOIN_MEMBER form. The `position` field measures where the CTA was clicked, indicating layout effectiveness. The donation campaign (socialfunch) is closed and excluded from tracking.
analytics.ctaMemberJoinNoDataDesc: Tracking just started or no user traffic yet.
analytics.ctaPositionDesc: Which surface (home / footer / fullscreen-menu / about / our-proof / transparency / archive) the click came from.
analytics.ctaDailyDesc: Daily member_join_click count over the period.
analytics.ctaShareDesc: ShareButtons clicks across 5 channels (facebook·twitter·kakao·sms·copy_link) + most-shared pages.
analytics.ctaShareNoDataDesc: Share buttons exist on pages but have not been clicked yet. Tracking just started or no user traffic yet.
analytics.pageReportDesc: Page title · views · active users · views per user · avg engagement · event count. Fetched directly from GA4 Data API — supplements page_title and engagement info missing from self-tracked page_views. Revenue excluded since e-commerce measurement is not set up.
analytics.pageReportNoDataDesc: GA4 OAuth environment variables are not set in production, or the API is temporarily unavailable. Add the 4 GA4_OAUTH_* variables from .env.local to Vercel production env to enable on the next build.
analytics.ctaPurchaseDesc: Clicks from ArtworkPurchaseCTA to the external shop (Cafe24). Tracked separately from internal checkout (orders) — measures conversion intent for legacy artworks.
analytics.ctaPurchaseNoDataDesc: No clicks routing to external shop yet from ArtworkPurchaseCTA.
analytics.ctaLocaleSwitchDesc: LanguageSwitcher clicks. Indicates which pages resonate with English users + ko→en / en→ko switch patterns.
analytics.ctaLocaleSwitchNoDataDesc: Users have not clicked the language switch yet.
analytics.ctaShareTopPagesDesc: TOP 10 pages by share-button clicks — content with viral potential.

petition.pageTitle: Oh Yoon Guui-dong Mural Petition — Operations
petition.pageDescription: Per PRD §10.7. All admin actions are auto-logged to the audit log.
petition.overviewForceCloseConfirm: Force closing the petition will disable the form and freeze the counter. Continue?
petition.overviewReopenConfirm: Reopen the petition? The form will become active again.
petition.overviewCronNote: When the deadline arrives, pg_cron auto-invokes close_petition (if enabled). This panel manually triggers close/reopen before the deadline.
petition.messagesAuditNote: Mask actions are auto-logged via trigger (mask_message / unmask_message).
petition.committeeFooter: The committee list is published in the founding declaration when results are announced. Get CSVs from the Overview tab.
petition.mailAutoReceipt: **Receipt on signing** — 1 email to signer (Resend, fire-and-forget)
petition.mailAutoMilestone: **Milestone alerts** — admin email/Slack on anomaly signals (§10.7.10)
petition.mailV2Body: PRD §10.7.6 bulk-send UI (preview, test send, queue) ships in v2. During v1 operations, send via the Resend dashboard or ad-hoc script.
petition.mailAuditNote: All bulk sends will be auto-logged to mail_send_* actions when v2 ships.
petition.signaturesSearchPlaceholder: Search name, email, phone, region, message
petition.signaturesTruncatedNotice: Loaded only the latest {shown} of {total}. Older rows are accessible via CSV export.
petition.signaturesDuplicateBadgeTitle: Two or more rows share this name (emails may differ)
petition.signaturesDeleteConfirmBody: Delete {name}'s signature. The total count will decrease by 1.
petition.signaturesDeleteConfirmIrreversible: This cannot be undone. A row snapshot is preserved in the audit log.
petition.editEmailReadOnlyHint: Email is bound to the duplicate-blocking hash and cannot be changed here (current: {email}). Ask the signer to delete and re-sign for incorrect emails.
petition.errorUpdateInvalidPhone: Phone must contain 9–15 digits and ≤30 input chars.
